reviewer: Codex visual review from application UI screenshots

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing does not match the same-name reference style; the visible sheet composition and callout strategy differ.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Reference uses a compact long-part layout; generated output includes misplaced long views, a separate title-frame region, and shifted isometric/projected views.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Reference end-offset, hole-location, right-side small projection, and grouping dimensions are not reproduced.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Visible dimensions are sparse/generic relative to the reference and cannot support manufacturing acceptance.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated drawing carries a large default titleblock/frame that is absent from the concise reference layout.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Generated notes/roughness area is generic and does not match the compact reference-style callout area.

findings: Generated sheet still carries a large default titleblock/frame area that is absent from the concise reference layout.
Long-thin front/top views are not arranged like the reference; the generated isometric view and small projected view are misplaced relative to the reference intent.
The visible dimension scheme is sparse/generic and does not reproduce the reference's end-offset, hole-location, and right-side small projection dimension grouping.
Notes and roughness text are placed as generic template text instead of the reference-style compact callout area.
entries.required_correction: Implement explicit reference-intent dimension groups for 006 first; do not use generic AutoDimension as the final visual output.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing does not reproduce the compact cylinder/end-feature reference presentation.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated views are arranged inside a default large sheet/titleblock layout instead of the compact reference distribution.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Diameter, tolerance, and thread/end-feature callouts visible in the reference are missing or not reproduced.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated dimensions are too sparse and not organized as readable reference-style callout groups.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated titleblock/frame dominates the lower sheet and does not match the reference.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Generic notes replace the concise reference manufacturing annotation style.

findings: Generated view placement uses a default large sheet/titleblock layout; reference is compact with orthographic views and isometric view distributed without a large template block.
Critical diameter/tolerance/thread callouts visible in the reference are not reproduced as readable reference-style dimensions.
Side/front view sizing and spacing differ enough that the drawing does not read like the same drafting standard.
entries.required_correction: After 006 is accepted, create a 007-specific reference-intent plan for cylinder/end features and compact diameter callouts.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated plate views do not match the reference's dominant face-view and concise note/dimension treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated output spreads views and adds a default titleblock; reference is centered around the large face view with a compact secondary view.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Reference dimensions and the visible red manufacturing note are not faithfully represented.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Feature and hole callouts are under-controlled visually; existing style evidence also reports DisplayDim uncertainty.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated large titleblock and notes region do not match the reference sheet style.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: The reference's visible red manufacturing warning/note intent is not preserved in the generated drawing.

findings: Reference has a dominant plate face view with concise dimensioning and a red manufacturing note; generated output spreads generic orthographic/isometric views and omits the visible note intent.
Generated drawing includes a large default titleblock and notes area that does not match the reference sheet style.
Hole/feature callouts are under-controlled visually; API/style warnings already include fallback DisplayDim uncertainty.
entries.required_correction: Treat 008 as a plate-layout reference after 006 passes; preserve the large face view and explicit note/dimension strategy.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing does not match the reference's diameter/internal-feature callout focus.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Side and isometric views are placed/scaled differently and the default frame changes the composition.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Diameter and internal feature dimensions visible in the reference are missing or too weak in the generated output.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated dimensions are sparse and do not form readable manufacturing callout groups.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated default titleblock/notes frame occupies too much sheet space.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Reference-style concise manufacturing annotation is replaced by generic template notes.

findings: Reference emphasizes diameter and internal feature callouts; generated output shows mostly geometry with missing/weak visible dimensions.
The default titleblock/notes frame occupies too much sheet space and does not match the reference presentation.
The generated side and isometric views are positioned and scaled differently from the compact reference composition.
entries.required_correction: After 006 acceptance, build cylinder-specific diameter/thread/length callout groups before UI review.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated high-density plate drawing does not reproduce the reference's hole/slot callout pattern.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Main view is too small and shifted; generated titleblock dominates the lower-right instead of the reference's balanced layout.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Most dense hole/slot/fastener dimensions and bottom projection callouts are missing.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated dimensions are insufficient for manufacturing even though supporting reports are pass-like.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated titleblock/frame treatment is incompatible with the reference layout.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Reference manufacturing annotation density is not represented; generated notes are generic.

findings: Reference has dense but intentional hole/slot and fastener callouts around a large face view; generated output shrinks the main view and loses most callout intent.
Bottom projection and title/notes area do not follow the reference balance; generated titleblock dominates the lower-right sheet.
Dimensions are visibly insufficient for manufacturing review even though structured reports claim support.
entries.required_correction: Use 015 as a later high-density plate sample; it requires a learned callout map, not generic view auto-placement.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated bracket drawing does not match the reference's stepped-height and hole-location dimension intent.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated views sit inside a large default frame and do not follow the reference's multi-view balance.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Height, hole, slot, and stepped-feature dimension groups visible in the reference are missing or not readable.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated drawing is mostly undimensioned geometry plus generic notes, not a usable manufacturing drawing.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated titleblock/border treatment differs from the reference and consumes excessive sheet area.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Generic template notes do not capture the reference manufacturing requirements.

findings: Reference shows a bracket with multiple orthographic views and many height/hole/slot dimensions; generated output is mostly undimensioned geometry plus generic template notes.
Critical hole-position and stepped-height dimension groups visible in the reference are missing or not readable in generated output.
The generated titleblock and border treatment do not match the reference style.
entries.required_correction: Use 022 later as a bracket intent-plan sample with explicit stepped-height and hole-location groups.
